name: Madame Monsieur
description: '''Madame Monsieur''' is a French duo consisting of vocalist Émilie Satt and producer Jean-Karl Lucas. They [[France in the Eurovision Song Contest 2018|represented France]] at the [[Eurovision Song Contest 2018]] in [[Lisbon]], Portugal with the song "[[Mercy (Madame Monsieur song)|Mercy]]", finishing in 13th place in the grand final.
